title: Create : artillery
description: Create addon with artillery and more
body:
**Create artillery mod adds to minecraft :**

- 2 cannons : 122mm a-15 , 152mm d-1
- 5 different shells : HE shell, Explosive shell, Armor piercing shell, Smoke shell , Impulse shell
- Compress block (ingradient)
- Lava printer (to make cannons)
**Crafts:**

- gunpowder mass - mixing: white wool , gunpowder
- gunpowder pillow - press gunpowder mass
- Compress block crafting - automate packing : sturdy sheet, brass block, presistion mechanism, andesite alloy block
- Lava printer crafting - aplicate blast furnance with compress block
- Shell craft -  sequence aplication : 3 times aplicate brass sheet and 1 gunpowder pillow , and 1 of fillings
- 122mm craft- up to 12 compress and up to 12000mb lava in Lava printer (depends of blueprints, check mechanics) (crafting time ~2min)
- 152mm craft- craft soon, but u can find it in creative
- Clear blueprint - mixing : paper and blue dye
- Blueprints - craft with blueprint table : clear blueprint and white dye + (10/20/30 xp lvls)
- Check another crafts with JEI
![Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e3d10a72296d0b6ce6d3c2846d0e274d9c5b142.png)
![Blueprint](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c69958a13eb37ed0e6a0754e3537836734cea31.png)
  
**Mechanics:**

- right click on cannon with Wrench to change cannon angle
- right click on cannon to open it
- right click on openned cannon with one of filled shells to charge
- right click on charged cannon to shoot
- to craft cannon in lava printer u need to place 4 blueprints in Lava printer , 1 Breech , 1 Tube , 1 Support, 1 Crater, Big blueprint - increases value of necessary compresses to 3, Medium - 2 , Small - 1
- to build cannon u need 3 or more compresses
